title: Nomismia aurea
taxonomy: Nomismia aurea is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Nomismia. The classification of Nomismia aurea is within the kingdom Plantae. More specifically, it belongs to the clade Angiosperms and the clade Eudicots. Further classification places it within the order Gentianales.
